Risk Description: Generated code may contain insecure patterns or unsupported dependencies
Existing Controls: Peer review and automated security scanning
Mitigation Plan: Require secure coding review dependency checks and test evidence before merge

Risk Description: The assistant may return content that the requesting user is not authorised to view
Existing Controls: Single sign-on and source document permissions
Mitigation Plan: Test retrieval permissions add denied-access scenarios and monitor authorisation failures

Risk Description: Personal or confidential information may be retained longer than required
Risk Rating: Approved vendor and restricted user group
Existing Controls: Define retention limits disable model training and document deletion procedures

Risk Description: An automated action could change resources outside the approved scope
Existing Controls: Keep production actions disabled require human approval and validate every requested permission
